meta.note: Canonical Gridmark Partners brand values, as defined in gridmark-design-system-v3.html. Gridmark is the civic-sector sibling brand of This Waay — brand primitives were originally inherited verbatim from This Waay v1.7, then this doc's own functional/semantic/component layers were built independently. This file mirrors the shape of This Waay's tokens.json for consistency, but the values are Gridmark's own — see /RELATIONSHIP.md for what's intentionally shared vs. intentionally different between the two brands. Do not merge with This Waay's tokens.json.

architecture.note: Gridmark documents an explicit 3-layer token architecture, unlike This Waay's flatter token block.
layers: L2 Semantic (role-based names mapped to primitives)
L3 Component (component-specific tokens mapped to semantic)

navy900.use: Deep navy — inherited from This Waay verbatim.

green500.use: Waay Green — inherited from This Waay verbatim.

greenPunch.use: Punch Green — inherited from This Waay verbatim.

green700.use: Derived pressed step; also used as success-500.

teal500.use: Teal — inherited from This Waay verbatim.

steel500.use: Steel Blue — inherited from This Waay verbatim; also used as info-500.

slate400.use: Slate — inherited from This Waay verbatim.

mint50.use: Mint — inherited from This Waay verbatim.

ice50.use: Ice — inherited from This Waay verbatim.

coral300.use: Path Coral — illustration only, inherited from This Waay verbatim.

brass500.use: Brass — Gridmark's own civic accent. No This Waay equivalent.

danger.use: Form/alert danger state. Gridmark-specific; not merged with This Waay's noInk (#A53727) — see RELATIONSHIP.md.

warning.use: Form/alert warning state. No This Waay equivalent.

success.use: Form/alert success state. Close to but distinct from This Waay's greenInk (#2C6D4D) — see RELATIONSHIP.md.

info.use: Form/alert info state. Identical value to steel-500.

accentCivic.use: Rare — parallels This Waay's Punch Green usage rule. Gridmark-only.

focusRing.use: box-shadow-based focus ring — different implementation from This Waay's outline-based ring, see RELATIONSHIP.md

mono.use: Gridmark-only addition — used for token/code specimens. This Waay's doc has no mono stack.

layout.wrapNote: wrap includes the outer drop-shadow chrome around the 1080px content container — same underlying content measure as This Waay, expressed with an extra outer wrapper. See RELATIONSHIP.md.

elevation.note: Gridmark defines an explicit 4-step elevation scale. This Waay's doc has only a single ad hoc card shadow.

motion.note: Gridmark defines named duration and easing tokens. This Waay's doc describes timing in prose only ("micro", "element", "reveal").

component.note: L3 component-layer tokens, mapped to the semantic layer above.

changelog.note: current — chapter reorg to the shared This Waay spine: Principles split into its own chapter, Accessibility folded into Foundations, Brand/System/Application renumbered. No token or component changes.
Full token architecture, status colors, accessibility conformance, component variants, page patterns, governance.
Realigned to This Waay v1.7 — exact tokens, Poppins type, green as system accent, shared structural devices, bridge illustration.
Brand exploration board — bridge mark kept, mint/green reintroduced, icons rebuilt, brass pulled back.

governance.lineage: Design System v3.1 - sibling to This Waay v1.7 - A This Waay Company
